personalInfo.name: Raju Shingadiya
personalInfo.title: Lead Android Developer
personalInfo.summary: Experienced Android Developer with 4+ years of expertise in building scalable mobile applications, leading teams, and delivering complex solutions including AOSP development, Kotlin Multiplatform, and modern Android architecture.

description: Delivered 20 AOSP Android apps, 2 firmware builds, and 4 custom kiosk device solutions
Handled all client communication to ensure smooth project execution
Developed cross-platform UI with Kotlin Multiplatform & Compose UI
Managed a 2-person team across multiple parallel projects
Built the Tileswale app (500K+ Downloads) using Jetpack components best practices
Gained hands-on experience with MVVM, Navigation, LiveData, Room, and more
Improved app performance, UI consistency, and code maintainability
Contributed to a feature-rich, scalable app now live on the Play Store
Developed secure fintech apps including Agent Center, Balance Center, and Complaint Box
Used anti-reverse engineering and Jetpack MVVM to deliver key banking features
Secured data with encryption, code obfuscation, and protected API communication
Worked with backend and QA teams to ship fast, scalable financial apps
Started Android development with core concepts: Activities, Fragments, RecyclerView
Built Desh Parivahan & Moozy apps with UI and API integration
Worked with Firebase, REST APIs, and local storage (Room/SQLite)
Improved debugging, Git usage, and team collaboration skills

education.details: Learned core skills in programming and system design
